creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hello,

as I could not find this information on your website I would need some
further feedback from your side:

In your original PR you stated: "We offer shared hosting through to
dedicated servers, all running FreeBSD".  What exactly does that mean?
Is it possible for a customer to use FreeBSD as operating system in his
hosting product?

Because the only statement regarding operating systems on your website
seems to be "Dedicated hosting allows your site to be hosted on your own
LINUX server located in our data centre."

Regards.

Johann Kois

- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
